2606.23993.title: Learning to Trigger: Reinforcement Learning at the Large Hadron Collider
2606.23993.paper_summary: High-throughput scientific facilities such as the Large Hadron Collider depend on real-time event filtering (\textit{triggering}) under tight constraints on bandwidth, latency, and storage. In practice, trigger menus are largely static and hand-tuned and can become suboptimal as detector conditions, pileup, and background composition drift over time. We cast online threshold tuning as a sequential decision-making problem: a reinforcement learning agent ingests streaming summaries of recent rates and signal-sensitive features and updates trigger thresholds to maximize signal efficiency while tracking a target background rate within a tolerance band. We adapt Group-Filtered Policy Optimization (GFPO) to streaming control and introduce two variants (GFPO-F, GFPO-FR) that enforce background rate feasibility during training. On a benchmark that emulates realistic collider operation, we study two representative triggers: a total transverse energy ($H_{T}$) trigger sensitive to pileup variation, and an anomaly-detection (AD) trigger based on reconstruction loss for rare or non-standard signatures. On Monte Carlo streams, our agent increases the fraction of in-tolerance time intervals by 48\% ($H_T$) and 28\% (AD), with a cumulative gain of up to 2\% in signal efficiency on those in-tolerance intervals. Transferring from simulation to \emph{real} collision data (CMS Run 283408), the same agent, without fine-tuning, achieves a 56\% ($H_T$) and 28\% (AD) in-tolerance improvement over baselines, with further signal-efficiency gain on both triggers. To our knowledge, this is the \emph{first} demonstration of RL-based trigger control on real Large Hadron Collider collision data. Code is available at https://github.com/Zixind/GFPO\_LHC.
2606.23993.paper_summary_zh: 高通量科學設施如大型強子對撞機依賴於在帶寬、延遲和儲存的嚴格限制下進行實時事件過濾（\textit{觸發}）。在實際操作中，觸發菜單大多是靜態且手動調整的，隨著探測器條件、堆積和背景組成隨時間漂移，這些菜單可能變得次優。我們將在線閾值調整視為一個序列決策問題：一個強化學習代理接收最近速率和信號敏感特徵的流式摘要，並更新觸發閾值，以最大化信號效率，同時在容忍帶內跟踪目標背景速率。我們將群體過濾策略優化（GFPO）適應於流式控制，並引入兩個變體（GFPO-F，GFPO-FR），在訓練期間強制執行背景速率的可行性。在一個模擬現實對撞機操作的基準上，我們研究了兩個代表性的觸發器：一個對堆積變化敏感的總橫向能量（$H_{T}$）觸發器，以及一個基於重建損失的異常檢測（AD）觸發器，用於稀有或非標準特徵。在蒙特卡洛流中，我們的代理將容忍時間區間的比例提高了48\%（$H_T$）和28\%（AD），在這些容忍區間的信號效率累積增益達到2\%。從模擬轉移到\emph{真實}碰撞數據（CMS Run 283408），同一代理在不進行微調的情況下，實現了相對基準的56\%（$H_T$）和28\%（AD）的容忍改善，並在這兩個觸發器上進一步提高了信號效率。據我們所知，這是基於強化學習的觸發控制在真實大型強子對撞機碰撞數據上的\emph{首次}演示。代碼可在 https://github.com/Zixind/GFPO\_LHC 獲得。
2606.23993.author: Zixin Ding et.al.
2606.23993.authors: Zixin Ding, Shaghayegh Emam, Giovanna Salvi, Cecilia Tosciri, Abhijith Gandrakota, Jennifer Ngadiuba, Nhan Tran, Christian Herwig, David W. Miller, Yuxin Chen
